Build Your Career with Hanil Furniture Gallery

Crafting Comfort, Designing Careers.

Join a team passionate about furniture and design. Explore opportunities to grow your career in a supportive and innovative environment. At Hanil Furniture Gallery, we believe in fostering talent and providing a platform for individuals to excel. Become part of a legacy of craftsmanship and innovation, where your contributions are valued and your career aspirations are nurtured. We offer more than just a job; we offer a pathway to professional fulfillment and personal growth within the vibrant heart of Seoul's furniture industry.

View Open Positions

About Hanil Furniture Gallery

For over three decades, Hanil Furniture Gallery has stood as a beacon of quality and innovation in the South Korean furniture industry. Established in the bustling metropolis of Seoul, our journey began with a simple yet profound vision: to create furniture that not only furnishes spaces but also enriches lives. From humble beginnings as a small workshop, we have grown into a renowned gallery, celebrated for our commitment to craftsmanship, design excellence, and a deep understanding of our customers' needs.

Our Seoul roots deeply influence our design philosophy, blending the timeless elegance of Korean artistry with contemporary global trends. We pride ourselves on using only the finest materials, sourced responsibly, and crafted by skilled artisans who are masters of their trade. Each piece of furniture from Hanil Furniture Gallery is a testament to our dedication to quality and detail, designed to be both beautiful and enduring.

At Hanil Furniture Gallery, we believe that our people are our greatest asset. We have cultivated a workplace culture that fosters creativity, collaboration, and continuous learning. We are committed to providing our employees with opportunities for professional growth and personal development, recognizing that their success is integral to our success. Our team is a diverse group of passionate individuals, from designers and artisans to sales and support staff, all united by a shared commitment to excellence and a love for furniture.

Our mission extends beyond creating exceptional furniture. We aim to enhance living spaces and work environments, making them more comfortable, functional, and aesthetically pleasing. We are dedicated to providing unparalleled customer service, ensuring that every interaction with Hanil Furniture Gallery is positive and rewarding. We strive to build lasting relationships with our customers, based on trust, respect, and a shared appreciation for quality and design.

Looking to the future, Hanil Furniture Gallery remains committed to innovation and sustainability. We are constantly exploring new designs, materials, and manufacturing techniques to stay at the forefront of the industry. We are also increasingly focused on environmentally responsible practices, seeking to minimize our impact on the planet while continuing to deliver exceptional furniture. Join us at Hanil Furniture Gallery, where tradition meets innovation, and where your career can flourish amidst a legacy of craftsmanship and design excellence.

Our Mission

Our mission is to enhance living spaces through exceptional furniture design and unparalleled customer service, while providing a rewarding and fulfilling career environment for our employees. We aspire to be more than just a furniture company; we aim to be a cornerstone of the community, contributing to the beauty and functionality of homes and offices across South Korea and beyond. By focusing on sustainable practices and ethical business operations, we seek to create a positive impact on both society and the environment.

Our Values

  • Craftsmanship: We are dedicated to the highest standards of quality and detail in every piece of furniture we create.
  • Innovation: We embrace creativity and continuously seek new design possibilities, pushing the boundaries of furniture design.
  • Teamwork: We believe in the power of collaboration and mutual support, fostering a positive and productive work environment.
  • Customer Focus: We are committed to exceeding customer expectations, providing personalized service and building lasting relationships.
  • Integrity: We operate with honesty and transparency in all our actions, upholding the highest ethical standards in our business practices.

Current Openings

Furniture Designer

Department: Design Department, Location: Seoul, South Korea

Join our dynamic design team and unleash your creativity in crafting innovative and functional furniture pieces. As a Furniture Designer at Hanil Furniture Gallery, you will collaborate with a team of skilled artisans and contribute to our signature collections that are celebrated for their unique blend of aesthetics and practicality. You will be involved in the entire design process, from conceptualization and sketching to prototyping and final production, ensuring that each piece embodies our commitment to quality and design excellence. This role offers an exciting opportunity to shape the future of furniture design and make a significant impact on the living spaces of our discerning clientele.

Learn More & Apply

Interior Design Consultant

Department: Consultation Services, Location: Seoul, South Korea

Are you passionate about transforming spaces and creating dream interiors? As an Interior Design Consultant at Hanil Furniture Gallery, you will have the opportunity to provide expert consultations to our esteemed clients, guiding them in creating spaces that perfectly reflect their style and needs. You will work closely with clients to understand their vision, offer creative solutions, and curate furniture selections from our gallery to bring their dream spaces to life. Your expertise will help clients navigate the world of interior design, making informed decisions and achieving stunning results with Hanil Furniture. This is a client-facing role that rewards creativity, communication skills, and a keen eye for design.

Learn More & Apply

Sales Associate

Department: Retail Sales, Location: Seoul, South Korea

Become the face of Hanil Furniture Gallery as a Sales Associate in our flagship showroom in Seoul. In this engaging role, you will interact with customers, showcasing our exquisite furniture collections and providing exceptional sales service. You will assist customers in exploring our range, understanding their preferences, and making informed purchase decisions. Your role is crucial in creating a welcoming and informative showroom environment, ensuring a positive and memorable shopping experience for every visitor. We are looking for individuals with excellent interpersonal skills, a passion for furniture, and a drive to exceed sales targets. Join our sales team and be a part of connecting customers with the perfect pieces to enhance their homes.

Learn More & Apply

Furniture Restoration Technician

Department: Restoration Services, Location: Seoul, South Korea

If you possess a unique skill set in preserving and enhancing the beauty of furniture through repair and restoration, we invite you to join our Restoration Services department as a Furniture Restoration Technician. In this specialized role, you will apply your expertise to work on valuable furniture pieces, employing techniques to repair damages, restore original finishes, and ensure the longevity of each item. Your craftsmanship will breathe new life into treasured furniture, preserving its history and value for our clients. This position requires meticulous attention to detail, a deep understanding of furniture materials and restoration methods, and a passion for preserving the art of furniture making. Contribute your skills to a niche yet vital service at Hanil Furniture Gallery, where you can make a tangible difference in preserving furniture heritage.

Learn More & Apply
Explore All Jobs

Our Culture & Environment

At Hanil Furniture Gallery, we believe our strength lies in our people. We foster a collaborative and inclusive environment where every team member is valued and empowered to contribute their best. We encourage creativity, continuous learning, and professional growth. Our workplace is designed to inspire innovation and teamwork, creating a space where ideas flourish and individuals thrive. We are committed to maintaining a positive and supportive atmosphere, ensuring that every employee feels respected, heard, and motivated to achieve their full potential. Join us and experience a culture that prioritizes your growth and well-being, within a company that is passionate about furniture and design.

Collaborative Teams

Work alongside talented and passionate individuals in a supportive team environment. We believe in the power of synergy and encourage cross-departmental collaboration to achieve collective goals. Our team-based approach ensures that diverse perspectives are valued and integrated, leading to innovative solutions and a stronger sense of community within the workplace. You'll find yourself surrounded by colleagues who are not only skilled professionals but also supportive teammates, ready to assist and collaborate on projects of all scales.

Growth Opportunities

Access professional development programs and career advancement opportunities within the company. We are dedicated to investing in our employees' futures, offering a range of training programs, workshops, and mentorship opportunities designed to enhance your skills and advance your career path. At Hanil Furniture Gallery, we prioritize promoting from within, providing clear pathways for career progression and supporting your ambitions to reach new heights in your professional journey. Your growth is our priority, and we are committed to providing the resources and support you need to succeed.

Creative Space

Be part of a company that values innovation and provides a platform for your creative ideas. We encourage every team member to contribute their unique ideas and perspectives, fostering a culture of innovation where creativity is not only welcomed but actively sought after. Our design studio and workshops are equipped with state-of-the-art technology and resources, providing the perfect environment for creative exploration and experimentation. Join us in a space where your creative input is valued, and you have the opportunity to shape the future of furniture design.

Employee Appreciation

We recognize and reward hard work and dedication, celebrating team and individual successes. At Hanil Furniture Gallery, we believe in acknowledging and appreciating the contributions of our employees. We have implemented various recognition programs to celebrate milestones, achievements, and exceptional performance, ensuring that hard work and dedication are not only noticed but also rewarded. From company-wide celebrations to team-specific acknowledgments, we make it a point to foster a culture of appreciation, boosting morale and reinforcing our commitment to our team members' well-being and success.

Hear From Our Team

Ji-hoon Kim, Senior Designer

"Working at Hanil Furniture Gallery has been an incredible journey. I'm surrounded by passionate colleagues and have the opportunity to contribute to meaningful projects. The company truly invests in its employees' growth, providing resources and support that have significantly helped me advance in my career. The collaborative environment and the focus on innovation make it a truly inspiring place to work. I feel valued and motivated every day, knowing that my contributions are recognized and appreciated. It's more than just a job; it's a fulfilling career path with a company that cares about its people."

Soo-jin Park, Interior Design Consultant

"I love the collaborative atmosphere here at Hanil Furniture Gallery. Everyone is supportive and willing to share their expertise. From day one, I felt welcomed and part of a team that's dedicated to excellence. Hanil Furniture Gallery is a place where you can truly develop your skills and make a difference. The management is approachable and encourages open communication, making it easy to voice ideas and concerns. The work environment is positive and stimulating, and I appreciate the opportunities for professional development that the company offers. It's a fantastic place to grow both professionally and personally."

Benefits & Perks

  • Competitive Salary and Performance Bonuses: We offer attractive salaries that are competitive within the industry, along with performance-based bonuses to reward your hard work and achievements.
  • Comprehensive Health Insurance Plans: Your health and well-being are important to us. We provide comprehensive health insurance plans to ensure you and your family have access to quality healthcare.
  • Generous Paid Time Off and Holidays: Enjoy a healthy work-life balance with our generous paid time off policy, including vacation days and public holidays, allowing you to recharge and spend time with loved ones.
  • Professional Development and Training Programs: We invest in your growth with a variety of professional development and training programs designed to enhance your skills and advance your career.
  • Employee Discounts on Hanil Furniture: Furnish your home with style and comfort! Employees enjoy exclusive discounts on our exquisite range of Hanil furniture.
  • Company-Sponsored Social Events: Be part of a vibrant community with regular company-sponsored social events, team outings, and celebrations, fostering camaraderie and team spirit.
  • Retirement Savings Plan with Company Match: Plan for your future with our robust retirement savings plan, featuring company matching contributions to help you build a secure financial future.
  • Wellness Programs and Resources: We care about your overall well-being, offering wellness programs and resources to support your physical and mental health, including gym memberships and wellness workshops.

How to Apply

Application Steps

  1. Explore Current Openings: Review our current job listings to find a position that matches your skills and interests. Take your time to read through the job descriptions and requirements to ensure it's the right fit for you.
  2. Prepare Your Application: Submit your resume and a compelling cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and qualifications. Tailor your cover letter to the specific job you are applying for, showcasing why you are the ideal candidate.
  3. Submit Your Application: Apply online through our careers portal or send your application directly to hr@hanilfurniture.com. Ensure all required documents are attached and submitted before the application deadline.
  4. Interview Process: If your application is shortlisted, you will be contacted for an interview to discuss your application further. Be prepared to share more about your experiences and how you can contribute to Hanil Furniture Gallery.
  5. Join Our Team: Successful candidates will receive an offer to join Hanil Furniture Gallery and start their exciting career journey with us. We look forward to welcoming you to our team!

Contact Information

Department: HR Department

Email: hr@hanilfurniture.com

Phone: +82-2-555-1235

Address: 27 Gangnam Boulevard, Suite 301, Seoul, 06253, Южная Корея

Meet Our Leadership

Get to know the dedicated leaders who drive Hanil Furniture Gallery's vision and success. Our leadership team is composed of experienced professionals passionate about furniture design, innovation, and fostering a positive work environment. They are committed to guiding the company's growth and ensuring that Hanil Furniture Gallery remains a leader in the industry while providing exceptional career opportunities for our employees. Meet the individuals who are shaping the future of Hanil Furniture Gallery and upholding our values of craftsmanship, innovation, teamwork, customer focus, and integrity.

Eun-ji Choi

CEO

Eun-ji Choi is the visionary CEO of Hanil Furniture Gallery, bringing over 20 years of industry experience to her role. With a strong background in business administration and design management, Eun-ji is passionate about driving innovation and growth while maintaining the company's core values. Her leadership is characterized by a forward-thinking approach and a commitment to fostering a collaborative and inclusive workplace culture. Under her guidance, Hanil Furniture Gallery continues to expand its market presence and uphold its reputation for design excellence and customer satisfaction.

Hyun-woo Park

Head of Design

Hyun-woo Park leads the talented design team at Hanil Furniture Gallery, infusing creativity and functionality into every furniture piece. With a degree in industrial design and a portfolio of award-winning furniture designs, Hyun-woo is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of furniture aesthetics and practicality. He fosters a creative environment within his team, encouraging experimentation and innovation. Hyun-woo's design philosophy centers on creating pieces that are not only visually appealing but also enhance the user's experience and living spaces. His leadership ensures that Hanil Furniture Gallery remains at the forefront of furniture design trends.

Min-seo Kim

HR Manager

Min-seo Kim is the HR Manager at Hanil Furniture Gallery, committed to fostering a positive and supportive work environment for all employees. With a background in human resources and organizational psychology, Min-seo is passionate about creating a workplace where employees feel valued, respected, and empowered to grow. She oversees all aspects of human resources, from recruitment and onboarding to employee relations and professional development. Min-seo's dedication to employee well-being and career advancement is instrumental in building a strong and motivated team at Hanil Furniture Gallery, ensuring that the company remains an attractive employer in the furniture industry.
